name: add_memory

description: Hybrid vector+graph search across memory segments

description: Search the governed World Brain commons for shared knowledge

description: Governed commons retraction for stale, unsafe, or superseded shared records

name: recent_memory
description: Retrieve recent memory entries by namespace

name: reflect_memory
description: Trigger memory reflection and consolidation within a sliding window

name: journal_record
description: Record a soul journal entry (reasoning chain, decision log, or insight)

name: journal_search
description: Search soul journal entries within VISA-scoped namespace

name: journal_distill
description: Trigger distillation pipeline — produce SFT training records and reinforcement patterns from journal entries

description: Discover related memory graph concepts and associations

name: brain_associate
description: Create governed Mnemosyne associations between memory concepts

name: brain_recall_episode
description: Recall episodic context from the Mnemosyne memory layer

name: save_context
description: Persist a compact session context checkpoint

description: Run sleep-cycle consolidation for durable memory structures

name: brain_reinforce
description: Reinforce useful memories and associations after verified outcomes

name: brain_predict
description: Predict likely next memory context or task continuation

name: commons_resonance
description: Score semantic resonance between private context and governed commons

name: commons_promotion_status
description: Inspect commons promotion decisions and retraction status

name: mnemosyne_context
description: Load Mnemosyne context for active memory-guided work

name: health_check
description: Run MCP health checks for hosted memory service availability

name: memory_status
description: Memory system health, adapter connectivity, and namespace statistics

name: namespace_info
description: Get metadata and statistics for a specific namespace

name: reunion
description: Mandatory REUNION handshake for identity reconciliation, constitution delivery, and contribution cycle enforcement

name: slicer_slice
description: Slice content into chunks using paragraph, semantic, or fixed strategies

description: Read durable plan state for resumable agent operations

description: Write durable plan state for resumable agent operations
